Bash(1 <<'PYEOF'
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, os.getcwd\(\)\)
from greenlang.schema_migration.change_detector import ChangeDetectorEngine, _extract_fields

engine = ChangeDetectorEngine\(\)

source = {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'address': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'city': {'type': 'string'}}}}}
target = {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'address': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'city': {'type': 'string'}, 'zip': {'type': 'string'}}}}}

src_f = _extract_fields\(source\)
print\('src address properties:', src_f.get\('address', {}\).get\('properties'\)\)

changes = engine.detect_nested_changes\(source, target\)
print\('Count:', len\(changes\)\)
for c in changes:
    print\(c['change_type'], c['field_path']\)
PYEOF)

Bash(1 <<'PYEOF'
import sys, os, importlib
sys.path.insert\(0, os.getcwd\(\)\)

# Import only the change_detector module directly
import greenlang.schema_migration.provenance
import greenlang.schema_migration.change_detector as cd

engine = cd.ChangeDetectorEngine\(\)

source = {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'address': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'city': {'type': 'string'}}}}}
target = {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'address': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'city': {'type': 'string'}, 'zip': {'type': 'string'}}}}}

src_f = cd._extract_fields\(source\)
print\('src address properties:', src_f.get\('address', {}\).get\('properties'\)\)

changes = engine.detect_nested_changes\(source, target\)
print\('Count:', len\(changes\)\)
for c in changes:
    print\(c['change_type'], c['field_path']\)
PYEOF)
